flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Virginia Highlands Community College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Virginia Highlands Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (48.9% → 59.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Virginia Highlands Community College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (16.7% → 19.4%).
